temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with a bruised and swollen face, wearing a black t-shirt, sits in the passenger seat of a car. He looks distressed and speaks urgently to the driver, who is out of focus in the background. The scene is dark and tense. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense conversation, establishing that the man in the passenger seat has been in a recent, violent altercation. He is recounting the event to the driver.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Urgent, distressed, and slightly panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and ominous musical score begins to play.)
(00:04-00:07) The camera cuts to a close-up of the driver, who has a bandaged and immobilized left wrist. He listens with a serious and concerned expression, his eyes fixed on the passenger as he processes the story. (Storyline: The driver's reaction confirms the gravity of the situation. His injured wrist suggests he may have also been in a fight, adding a layer of personal stakes to the conversation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: The passenger's voice is heard off-screen, continuing his story. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, dramatic score continues.)
